frameworks.name: evidence accumulation
frameworks.one_line: provisional choice formed by integrating evidence until action time

frameworks.name: changes-of-mind model
frameworks.one_line: behavioral model predicts mid-trial reversals of provisional decision

frameworks.name: frontal orienting fields motor-planning account
frameworks.one_line: FOF represents provisional decision driving orienting action

core_question: Does the rat FOF encode a provisional decision during dynamic evidence accumulation, tracking model-predicted changes of mind?
key_assumptions: accumulated evidence drives a provisional choice prior to action
behavioral model of decision process generalizes to neural reversals
FOF firing rates can be mapped to provisional choice state
manipulations: static vs dynamic evidence accumulation environment
trials inducing model-predicted changes of mind
temporal alignment to expected action time
key_findings: FOF encodes accumulated evidence throughout decision formation
encoding gain rises temporally toward potential action time
FOF firing-rate reversals align with model-predicted changes of mind
interpretations: FOF represents provisional decisions even in dynamic uncertain environments
this representation supports rapid motor execution when action is required
